value.found_quote:
## Mobile push notifications

When Remote Control is active, Claude can send push notifications to your phone.
value.rationale: The page contains a dedicated "Mobile push notifications" section describing that Claude can send push notifications to your phone when Remote Control is active, including setup instructions. This directly substantiates the claim. The feature is part of Remote Control (which is in research preview), but the push notification feature itself is described as a working capability with version requirements (v2.1.110+), indicating active availability.
